system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Sofia Li. I’m calling because the bicycle I ordered just arrived and it’s damaged. I’m honestly really frustrated because this was a pretty expensive purchase, and I need to get a refund as soon as possible. Can you help me with that? I want the refund to go back to my credit card.

I’m sorry to hear about the damaged bicycle, Sofia. I’ll do my best to help you with the return and refund process.

To get started, I need to verify your identity. Could you please provide either your email address or your zip code so I can locate your account?
I actually don’t remember which email I used for the order, but my zip code is 78260. Will that work?
Thank you for providing your zip code. To locate your account, I’ll also need your full first and last name as it appears on the order. Could you please confirm your full name?
Yes, my full name is Sofia Li.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for confirming your name and zip code. It seems there was a technical issue when trying to locate your account. Could you please provide either your email address or any order number you might have from your purchase confirmation? This will help me locate your order and assist you further.
I’m sorry, but I don’t remember my email address right now. I do have the order number from my confirmation email—let me check. Okay, here it is: 45783921. Can you use that to find my order?
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your order number. I’m currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your order details. Because of this, I’m unable to proceed with your request right now.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further and ensure your refund is processed as quickly as possible. Please hold on.

arguments.summary: Customer Sofia Li received a damaged bicycle (order #45783921) and requests a refund to her credit card. Unable to retrieve order details due to technical issues. Needs urgent assistance.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I apologize, but I am currently unable to access your order details due to a technical issue. I recommend reaching out to our customer service team directly by phone or email for immediate assistance with your refund request. 

If you have any other information or if you’d like to try again later, please let me know. I’m here to help however I can.

Oh, that’s really disappointing. I was hoping to get this sorted quickly since the bike was expensive and I need the refund soon. Is there any way you can escalate this or let someone know that I need urgent help? I’d really appreciate it if you could make sure my case gets priority when I call or email.

arguments.summary: Customer Sofia Li received a damaged bicycle (order #45783921) and urgently requests a refund to her credit card. She is frustrated due to the high value of the purchase and needs priority assistance. Unable to retrieve order details due to technical issues. Needs urgent escalation.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I completely understand your frustration, especially given the situation and the value of your purchase. I am trying to escalate your case, but I am currently experiencing technical issues that prevent me from transferring your request directly to a human agent.

I strongly recommend contacting our customer service team by phone or email and mentioning your order number (#45783921), the damaged item, and your need for urgent assistance. If you reference this conversation and explain the urgency, they should be able to prioritize your case.

Again, I’m very sorry for the inconvenience. If there’s anything else I can do or if you’d like to try again later, please let me know.

Alright, I’ll call the customer service team and mention my order number and the urgency. I really hope this gets resolved quickly—I just want my money back on my credit card. Thanks for your help, even though it’s frustrating that there’s a technical issue. If there’s any update or if you’re able to help later, please let me know.

Thank you for your understanding, Sofia. I truly apologize for the inconvenience and frustration this has caused. If the technical issue is resolved or if you reach out again, I’ll do everything I can to assist you promptly.

Please mention your order number (#45783921) and request for a refund to your credit card when you contact customer service—they’ll be able to help you further and prioritize your case.

If you have any updates or need further assistance in the future, don’t hesitate to reach out. I hope your issue is resolved quickly. Thank you for your patience.
Thank you. I’ll make sure to mention all of that when I call. I really hope this gets sorted out soon. Have a good day.
You’re very welcome, Sofia. I hope your issue is resolved quickly and smoothly. If you need any further assistance in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Wishing you a good day as well!
Thanks. I appreciate your help. Goodbye.

arguments.summary: Customer Sofia Li received a damaged bicycle (order #45783921) and requests a refund to her credit card. Unable to retrieve order details due to technical issues. Needs urgent assistance.

Customer Sofia Li received a damaged bicycle (order #45783921) and urgently requests a refund to her credit card. She is frustrated due to the high value of the purchase and needs priority assistance. Unable to retrieve order details due to technical issues. Needs urgent escalation.

final_response: You’re very welcome, Sofia. I hope your issue is resolved quickly and smoothly. If you need any further assistance in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Wishing you a good day as well!
